## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthX and RAMP Holdings to discuss SEO performance, content progress, and action items.](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance: Slight bump in clicks, holding steady overall; recommendation to implement user stories](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Vendor pages: 2 weeks post-publish, impressions increasing but clicks steady](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy for vendor pages: Manual addition of links in alternatives section](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [BestBank article: New workflow implemented, awaiting approval on gathered bank data](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Blog articles: Bump in clicks, steady overall; recommend adding user stories](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Pluridium pages: Jump in clicks, lower than peak but within range; holding position vs. competitors](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Reversed downtrend, impressions increased](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [Some position losses for software review keywords, but core expense keywords performing well](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Flagged spelling mistake in "stationary" page slug](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Improved from Oct-Nov baseline, ignoring two exceptional peaks](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Assets vs. liabilities at LIFO showing in featured snippets and "People also ask"](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Low performance, significant impression dive; monitoring for patterns](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Vendor pages: 2 weeks post-publish, steady clicks, increasing impressions](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Content Progress

  - [Vendor pages: 5 more in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy: Manual addition of links in alternatives section for vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Blog refresh: Awaiting list of blogs based on internal workflows](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [BestBank article: New workflow implemented](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Using Trustpilot for user reviews, focusing on checking accounts](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Gathering data for approved banks, adding search volume for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

### Action Items and Discussions

  - [Victoria to review new BestBank article format](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ali to approve more state-specific bank articles](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [GrowthX to add/confirm primary keywords and search volume for state bank articles](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [GrowthX to re-run and share list of URLs for potential redirect/refresh](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Ongoing work on vendor page categorization](https://fathom.video/share/LPnzcXWYsWAeFxYvKsZPR9tty9PS9URo?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Next Steps
